headline: Taylor Foods May Not Be Responsible for Cyclospora Outbreak. Why Sweetgreen and Others Are Dropping.
summary: U.S. regulators walked back its findings about contaminated lettuce, saying that the Taylor Farms sample initially reported as positive for cyclospora was actually a false positive.

headline: QUICK SPARK: Taco Bell, Cava, Chipotle Visits Plunge on Food-Borne Parasite
summary: Taco Bell and other fast-casual chains are seeing a decline in customers due to a Cyclospora outbreak linked to contaminated lettuce.
